creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Errr, can this not be handled by turning off the CURL_DEBUG port option? 
Could you run "make config", uncheck the CURL_DEBUG option and see if 
this helps your build? 

Erm, yeah, well, the naming of the options is somewhat inconsistent - 
the CURL_DEBUG option controls the --enable-debug configure option 
(I didn't want to use the generic "DEBUG" for the option name), and 
the TRACKMEMORY option controls the, well, "--enable-curldebug" 
configure option :)
